ValidationRule.description: Validates if Estate Number is unique
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( $User.LastName <> $Label.DataArchiverUser,IF(ISNEW(), IF( UPPER(Name) == UPPER(VLOOKUP( $ObjectType.Insolvency__c.Fields.Name, $ObjectType.Insolvency__c.Fields.Name, Name)),true , false),
AND(ISCHANGED(Name), IF( UPPER(Name) == UPPER(VLOOKUP($ObjectType.Insolvency__c.Fields.Name, $ObjectType.Insolvency__c.Fields.Name, Name)),true,false))))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Estate Number is already used, please use different Estate Number
